name: Giant Honey & Oat Cookies
recipeIngredient: 4 cups Quick-cooking or old fashioned Oats
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Grease a cookie sheet with shortening.
3. In a large bowl, mix together the sugar, shortening, honey, and egg whites until well combined.
4. Stir in the remaining ingredients (oats, flour, baking soda, and salt) until evenly distributed.
5. Drop rounded 1/4 cupfuls of dough about 3 inches apart onto the prepared cookie sheet.
6. Bake for 11 to 14 minutes, or until the edges are lightly browned and the centers are still soft.
7. Allow cookies to cool on the baking sheet for 3 to 4 minutes before transferring them to a wire rack to cool completely.
